Troubleshooting Claude isn't offering to use my apps Make sure you're using the latest version of the Claude iOS app. See How to update Claude for iOS for instructions. Make sure you're using the latest version of the Claude iOS app. See How to update Claude for iOS for instructions. Try being more specific in your request (refer to the examples listed above). Try being more specific in your request (refer to the examples listed above). Restart Claude for iOS and try again. Restart Claude for iOS and try again. Permission prompts don't appear Check that the app for which Claude needs permissions is installed and set up on your phone. Check that the app for which Claude needs permissions is installed and set up on your phone. Verify iOS system permissions by navigating to Settings > Privacy & Security. Verify iOS system permissions by navigating to Settings > Privacy & Security. Ensure Claude for iOS has the necessary permissions enabled. Ensure Claude for iOS has the necessary permissions enabled. Features aren't working as expected Your iOS mobile apps may format content slightly differently than Claude. Your iOS mobile apps may format content slightly differently than Claude. You can always edit the content in the destination app before sending or saving. You can always edit the content in the destination app before sending or saving. Some features may vary based on your iOS version. Some features may vary based on your iOS version. Calendar events aren't opening correctly Verify you have a calendar app installed. Verify you have a calendar app installed. Check that your preferred calendar app is set as the default for calendar events. Check that your preferred calendar app is set as the default for calendar events. Make sure the calendar app you’re trying to use is up to date. Make sure the calendar app you’re trying to use is up to date. Health data isn't appearing or seems incomplete Verify that you have a Pro or Max plan and are located in the US. Verify that you have a Pro or Max plan and are located in the US. Check that you've granted Claude access to the relevant health data types in Settings > Health > Data Access & Devices > Claude.
